tasks.title: Set up monorepo, dev tooling, and Docker Compose infrastructure
tasks.description: Initialize Turborepo monorepo with packages: web (Next.js 15), api (Fastify), shared (types/utils). Set up TypeScript strict mode, ESLint, Prettier. Create Docker Compose with postgres:16, redis:7, minio, meilisearch containers. Add health checks, .env.example, and dev scripts. This is the foundation everything else builds on.

subtasks.description: Initialize Turborepo with web, api, and shared packages
Configure TypeScript strict mode, ESLint, Prettier across all packages
Create Docker Compose with postgres, redis, minio, meilisearch
Add dev scripts (dev, build, lint, test) and .env.example

votes.reason: Foundation task - nothing can start without monorepo, tooling, and infrastructure. Must be first.

tasks.title: Implement Auth & Identity module with multi-tenant foundation
tasks.description: Build the foundational auth system: User, Organization, Department, Session entities. Email+password registration/login with bcrypt. JWT session tokens. Multi-tenant isolation with org_id on all tables + row-level security. Magic link login. 2FA (TOTP). User profiles. API key management. Department hierarchy. This must be solid before any other module starts. See Module 1 in goal.md (FR-1.1 through FR-1.15).

subtasks.description: Create PostgreSQL schema for User, Organization, Department, Session, APIKey
Implement registration, login, logout with bcrypt + JWT
Add row-level security and org_id tenant isolation
Implement magic link, 2FA/TOTP, session management
Build department hierarchy CRUD and user invitation flows
Add API key management and OAuth 2.0 authorization code flow

votes.reason: Second priority after T-001. All modules depend on auth, multi-tenant isolation, and user entities.
Auth is the clear next priority. All module dependencies require users and orgs. Infrastructure is solid. Dependencies installed.

Code quality is solid. Auth patterns are correct (bcrypt 12 rounds, JWT with session validation, sensitive field stripping). 2/6 subtasks done. RLS and remaining features (2FA, magic link, departments, API keys) can continue with same patterns.
Continuing T-002 subtask 3 (RLS). Will also address reviewer feedback: extract authenticate middleware and add rate limiting. Auth foundation must be solid before other modules.
Iteration 5: Fixed rate limiting bug (status code 500→429). Schema/index.ts import path fixed for drizzle-kit compatibility. Continuing T-002 subtask 3 (RLS) or subtask 4 (magic link, 2FA).

Code quality remains solid. Session management (FR-1.10) properly implemented with ownership verification. Patterns from progress log (bcrypt, JWT+session, sensitive field stripping) consistently applied. 2/6 subtasks done, 1 partially complete. Clear path forward for remaining work (magic link, 2FA, RLS, departments, API keys). Test coverage good (26 passing unit tests).
Auth foundation solid. Session management complete. Magic link/2FA/departments can be added incrementally. Not blocking T-003.

Code quality solid. Session management complete. Known tech debt: JWT_SECRET default (config.ts:19), multi-tenant login context (auth.service.ts:122). Messenger module correctly reuses auth patterns. Ready to continue subtasks 3-6 (RLS, magic link, 2FA, departments, API keys) when needed.

comments.message: Reviewer note: The authenticate middleware in auth.routes.ts:32-67 should be extracted to a shared module (e.g., modules/auth/middleware.ts) since all protected routes across future modules will need it. Do this when implementing subtask 3 (RLS).

Reviewer note: Consider adding rate limiting to auth endpoints (login, register) before moving to T-003. FR-1.14 mentions password policies but rate limiting is implicit in any secure auth system. Could use @fastify/rate-limit.

Iteration 4: Extracted authenticate middleware to modules/auth/middleware.ts for reuse by other modules. Added requireAdmin and requirePrimaryAdmin middleware. Added rate limiting (10 req/min) to login/register endpoints using @fastify/rate-limit. Fixed TypeScript strict mode errors in auth.service.ts.

Iteration 5: Added session management (FR-1.10) - GET /auth/sessions and DELETE /auth/sessions/:id. Fixed rate limiting status code (429). Fixed drizzle-kit schema import compatibility. Subtask 4 partially complete (sessions done, magic link + 2FA remain).

Reviewer (Iter 6): config.ts:19 still has JWT_SECRET default value. This is a real security concern - production servers should FAIL to start without a real secret. Suggest: if NODE_ENV=production and JWT_SECRET matches the default, throw an error at startup. Low-priority but worth addressing before public deployment.

Reviewer (Iter 6): auth.service.ts:122 - login query finds users 'across all orgs'. Comment says 'for now'. This is correct for single-org/demo deployments but will need org context (domain-based routing?) for true multi-tenant. Document this as a known limitation or create a follow-up task if FR-1.6 (org domain verification) is planned before public launch.

tasks.title: Build Messenger with real-time WebSocket delivery
tasks.description: Core messaging: 1:1 DMs, group chats, topic groups. Message types: text with rich formatting, code blocks, voice messages. Real-time delivery via WebSocket + Redis pub/sub. Threads, replies, forwarding. Edit/recall within 24h. Reactions, read receipts, typing indicators, presence. Pins, favorites, chat tabs. Message search. See Module 2 in goal.md (FR-2.1 through FR-2.32).

subtasks.description: Create Chat, Message, ChatMember entities and API routes
Implement WebSocket server with Redis pub/sub for real-time delivery
Build rich text messages, threads, replies, forwarding
Add reactions, read receipts, typing indicators, presence
Implement pins, favorites, chat tabs, announcements

votes.reason: Ready to start once T-002 is further along. Messenger depends on auth but can begin schema/routing work in parallel with T-002 subtask 3+.

Auth foundation (T-002) now has session management, rate limiting, and extracted middleware. T-003 can begin schema design and CRUD routes for Chat, Message, ChatMember. Real-time WebSocket work should follow once HTTP routes are tested. Recommend starting with subtask 1 (entities + routes).
Ready to start. Auth middleware reusable. Will validate auth patterns work across modules. Starting with subtask 1 (schema + CRUD routes).

Subtask 1 complete with high quality. Module structure matches established patterns. 42 unit tests covering validation and auth. CRUD API comprehensive. WebSocket work (subtask 2) is the clear next step. See specific nudges in comments.

comments.message: Reviewer (Iter 6): When starting T-003, follow the module structure established in T-002: modules/messenger/index.ts, messenger.routes.ts, messenger.service.ts, messenger.schemas.ts. Reuse the authenticate middleware from modules/auth/middleware.ts. Use the same test pattern: unit tests always run, integration tests skip when SKIP_DB_TESTS=true.

Iteration 8: Implemented subtask 1 (Chat, Message, ChatMember entities and API routes). Created db/schema/messenger.ts with Chat, ChatMember, Message, MessageReaction, MessageReadReceipt, Pin, Favorite tables. Created modules/messenger/ with routes, service, schemas. Added 42 unit tests covering schema validation and auth requirements. All routes require authentication via existing middleware. WebSocket work (subtask 2) remains for future iteration.

Reviewer (Iter 9): messenger.service.ts:443-466 getMessages() makes two DB calls for cursor pagination (fetching cursor message to get createdAt). Consider composite cursor (createdAt+id) or caching to avoid extra query. Not blocking but worth noting for performance at scale.

Reviewer (Iter 9): messenger.routes.ts:565-571 - POST /chats/:chatId/pins validates messageId with inline casting 'as { messageId: string }'. Should use a Zod schema like other endpoints for consistency. Low priority fix.

Reviewer (Iter 9): No integration tests for messenger module yet (only unit tests). When WebSocket work begins, consider adding integration tests similar to auth.integration.test.ts to verify actual DB operations.

tasks.title: Build Calendar module with event scheduling and room booking
tasks.description: Calendar events with title, time, timezone, attendees. RFC 5545 recurring events. RSVP. Meeting room booking with capacity/equipment search. Availability finder across attendees. Working hours, conflict detection. Shared and public calendars. Auto-create meeting chat. Drag-and-drop rescheduling. iCal import/export. See Module 6 in goal.md (FR-6.1 through FR-6.15).

subtasks.description: Create CalendarEvent, EventAttendee, MeetingRoom, Calendar entities
Implement event CRUD with recurrence rules and RSVP
Build room booking and availability search
Add shared calendars, iCal import/export, drag-and-drop UI

tasks.title: Build Docs collaborative block editor with Yjs + Hocuspocus
tasks.description: Block-based document editor using TipTap v3 + Yjs for real-time CRDT collaboration. 30+ block types: headings, lists, todos, code, tables, callouts, equations, etc. Slash commands, floating toolbar, drag handles. Real-time cursors for up to 150 editors. Auto-save via Hocuspocus. Four permission levels. Version management. Comments anchored to text. Synced blocks. Templates. Import/export (.docx, .md, .pdf). See Module 7 in goal.md (FR-7.1 through FR-7.21).

subtasks.description: Set up Hocuspocus server with Yjs persistence to PostgreSQL
Build TipTap editor with core block types (headings, lists, code, tables)
Add slash commands, floating toolbar, drag handles
Implement document permissions, sharing, version management
Add comments, synced blocks, templates, import/export

tasks.title: Build Wiki knowledge base with hierarchical spaces
tasks.description: Wiki spaces (private/public) with three roles (admin, editor, viewer). Hierarchical page tree with unlimited depth. Pages are documents (Doc, Sheet, Slide, MindNote). Left sidebar navigation, breadcrumbs. Move pages between spaces. Search within/across spaces. Bookmarks. Permission inheritance from parent pages. See Module 11 in goal.md (FR-11.1 through FR-11.12).

subtasks.description: Create WikiSpace, WikiSpaceMember, WikiPage entities
Implement space CRUD with roles and page tree management
Build sidebar navigation, breadcrumbs, page search
Add permission inheritance and bookmark functionality

tasks.title: Build Sheets collaborative spreadsheet with HyperFormula
tasks.description: Grid-based spreadsheet with Yjs collaboration. 500+ Excel-compatible formulas via HyperFormula. Cell formatting, conditional formatting, data validation. Pivot tables. Charts (bar, line, pie, etc.) embeddable in Docs. Filter views, freeze rows/columns. Multi-sheet workbooks. Import/export .xlsx/.csv. Protected ranges. See Module 8 in goal.md (FR-8.1 through FR-8.14).

subtasks.description: Build spreadsheet grid renderer with cell editing
Integrate HyperFormula for formula evaluation
Add Yjs collaboration with cell-level conflict resolution
Implement formatting, charts, pivot tables, filter views
Add import/export for xlsx and csv

tasks.title: Build Base no-code database with views and automations
tasks.description: Airtable-like relational database. 25+ field types (text, number, select, date, person, link, formula, lookup, etc.). 6 view types: grid, kanban, calendar, gantt, gallery, form. Filtering, sorting, grouping. Record detail panel. Linked records between tables. 14 automation triggers with action chains. Canvas-based workflow builder. Dashboard builder with charts. See Module 12 in goal.md (FR-12.1 through FR-12.25).

subtasks.description: Create Base, BaseTable, BaseField, BaseRecord entities
Implement 25+ field types with validation
Build grid view with filtering, sorting, grouping
Add kanban, calendar, gantt, gallery, form views
Implement automations engine with triggers and actions
Build dashboard builder with chart types

tasks.title: Build Video Meetings with LiveKit WebRTC
tasks.description: Video/audio conferencing using LiveKit SFU. Instant and scheduled meetings. Join via link (no account for guests). Gallery/speaker layouts. Virtual backgrounds. Screen sharing + Magic Share (co-edit docs). Breakout rooms. In-meeting chat, polls. Multi-language subtitles. Cloud recording. Meeting lobby, host controls. Auto-create meeting group chat. See Module 4 in goal.md (FR-4.1 through FR-4.16).

subtasks.description: Integrate LiveKit server and client SDK
Build meeting creation, joining, and lobby UI
Implement video layouts, screen sharing, virtual backgrounds
Add breakout rooms, polls, in-meeting chat
Implement cloud recording and meeting group chat creation

tasks.title: Build Lark Minutes with AI transcription and summarization
tasks.description: Auto-generate transcripts from meeting recordings via Whisper ASR. Speaker diarization. AI-generated summaries: key points, action items, smart chapters. Searchable transcripts. Smart playback (speed, silence skip, click-to-jump). Comments on paragraphs. Translation. Extract action items as Tasks. Share/embed in Docs. See Module 5 in goal.md (FR-5.1 through FR-5.10).

subtasks.description: Set up Whisper ASR pipeline for meeting recordings
Implement speaker diarization and transcript generation
Build AI summary generation (key points, action items, chapters)
Create smart playback UI with transcript navigation

tasks.title: Build Tasks & Project Management with list/kanban/gantt views
tasks.description: Task creation from 6 entry points (app, chat, docs, email, calendar, base). Multi-owner assignment. Subtasks (5 nesting levels). Custom fields. Recurring tasks. Three views: list, kanban, gantt. Gantt with dependency arrows (4 types), milestones, critical path. Task notifications and comments with @mentions. Link tasks to calendar/docs/base. 'My Tasks' dashboard. See Module 15 in goal.md (FR-15.1 through FR-15.11).

subtasks.description: Create Task, TaskList, TaskDependency entities and API
Build list and kanban views with drag-and-drop
Implement gantt chart with dependencies and critical path
Add cross-module task creation and My Tasks dashboard

tasks.title: Build Approval Workflows with multi-step routing
tasks.description: Form builder for approval types (leave, reimbursement, procurement, custom). Multi-step flows with configurable reviewers. Conditional routing based on form values. Parallel and sequential approval modes. Auto-escalation on timeout. In-chat approval cards (approve/reject from Messenger). Full audit trail. Dashboard. Template library. See Module 17 in goal.md (FR-17.1 through FR-17.11).

subtasks.description: Create ApprovalTemplate, ApprovalRequest, ApprovalStep entities
Build form builder and multi-step workflow designer
Implement conditional routing and parallel/sequential modes
Add in-chat approval cards and approval dashboard

tasks.title: Build OKR tracking with alignment and scoring
tasks.description: OKR cycles with configurable periods. Objectives with Key Results (target, current, weight, score). Alignment tree with minimap. Leader confirmation for aligned objectives. Regular check-ins on KRs. Auto-scoring (0.6-0.7 = good). OKR on user profiles. Insert in Docs with bi-directional sync. Manager dashboard. Version history. See Module 16 in goal.md (FR-16.1 through FR-16.12).

subtasks.description: Create OKRCycle, Objective, KeyResult, OKRCheckin entities
Build OKR creation, check-in, and scoring UI
Implement alignment tree with leader confirmation
Add manager dashboard and Docs embedding

tasks.title: Build Attendance & HR with clock-in and leave management
tasks.description: GPS and Wi-Fi clock-in with location verification. Three shift types (fixed, flex, imported). Attendance groups with configurable rules. Leave types with accrual rules and balance tracking. Leave requests integrated with Approval Workflows. Overtime calculation (3 methods) with pay/time-off compensation. Four admin roles. Statistics dashboards. See Module 18 in goal.md (FR-18.1 through FR-18.15).

subtasks.description: Create attendance entities (groups, locations, clock records, shifts)
Implement GPS/Wi-Fi clock-in verification
Build leave management with accrual, balance, and approval integration
Add overtime calculation and attendance dashboards

tasks.title: Build Email module with custom domains and IMAP/SMTP
tasks.description: Send/receive email with rich text. Thread-based views. Custom domain setup (DNS verification, MX, DKIM/SPF/DMARC). Mailbox provisioning. Mailing lists. Folder management. Search with operators. IMAP/SMTP access with app-specific passwords. Third-party email linking (Gmail, Outlook). Email-to-Task conversion. Signatures. See Module 19 in goal.md (FR-19.1 through FR-19.12).

subtasks.description: Set up Haraka SMTP server or transactional email integration
Create Mailbox, EmailMessage, EmailDomain entities
Build email composition, threading, and folder UI
Implement custom domain verification and IMAP access

tasks.title: Build Board whiteboard with collaborative canvas
tasks.description: Infinite canvas whiteboard with pan, zoom, minimap. Elements: shapes, connectors, sticky notes, text, images, sections, tables. Freeform drawing. Mind maps on board. Auto-routing connectors. Templates gallery. Comments on elements. Real-time collaboration with cursors. Export PNG/SVG/PDF. Embed in Docs. See Module 13 in goal.md (FR-13.1 through FR-13.10).

subtasks.description: Build canvas engine with pan, zoom, element rendering
Implement shapes, connectors, sticky notes, drawing tools
Add real-time collaboration and export

tasks.title: Build Forms with conditional logic and Base integration
tasks.description: 12+ question types (text, select, rating, NPS, location, file upload, etc.). Conditional display logic. List and step display modes. Form settings (anonymous, scheduling, limits). Custom themes. Distribution via link/QR/messenger. Responses auto-saved to linked Base table. Auto-generated analytics dashboard. Inline polls in Docs and chats. See Module 14 in goal.md (FR-14.1 through FR-14.9).

subtasks.description: Create Form, FormQuestion, FormResponse entities
Build form designer with question types and conditional logic
Implement form distribution, response collection, and Base sync
Add analytics dashboard and inline polls

tasks.title: Build Slides and MindNotes collaborative editors
tasks.description: Slides: drag-and-drop slide editor with text, images, shapes, charts. Master layouts. Presenter view with notes. Live link presentation. PPTX import/export. Transitions/animations. MindNotes: dual view (outline + mind map). Four tree layouts. Keyboard-driven editing. Node formatting. Collapse/expand. Export to image/PDF/OPML. Both use Yjs collaboration. See Modules 9-10 in goal.md.

subtasks.description: Build slide editor with element placement and master layouts
Implement presenter view and live link presentation
Build mind map renderer with outline toggle
Add PPTX import/export and OPML export

tasks.title: Build Admin Console and Workplace dashboard
tasks.description: Admin Console: org settings, department management, user management, custom admin roles, SSO/SCIM config, 2FA enforcement, audit logs (180+ days), DLP pattern matching, watermark protection, external communication controls, storage monitoring, room management, app management. Workplace: customizable dashboard with app shortcuts, widgets, role-based layouts. See Module 23 in goal.md (FR-23.1 through FR-23.19).

subtasks.description: Build admin console with org/user/department management
Implement audit logging, security policies, DLP
Build customizable Workplace dashboard with widgets
Add app management and role-based layouts

tasks.title: Build Global Search with cross-module indexing
tasks.description: Cmd+K global search across contacts, messages, docs, events, emails, tasks. Category filtering. Advanced operators (from:, to:, in:, filetype:, date ranges, exact phrase). Real-time indexing (searchable within seconds). Permission-aware results. Context snippets. In-page search. Search suggestions and history. Use Meilisearch or PostgreSQL FTS. See Module 20 in goal.md (FR-20.1 through FR-20.8).

subtasks.description: Set up Meilisearch indexes for all content types
Build indexing pipeline that syncs content in real-time
Implement Cmd+K search UI with category filters
Add advanced operators and permission-aware filtering

tasks.title: Build Open Platform with REST APIs, webhooks, and bot SDK
tasks.description: App registration with App ID + Secret and scopes. Three app forms: Bot, Web App, Gadget. OAuth 2.0 flows. Three token types (app, tenant, user). REST API coverage across all modules. Event subscriptions with webhook delivery (retry + logs). WebSocket event streaming. Interactive message cards (buttons, dropdowns, forms). Card builder tool. Rate limiting. Node.js Bot SDK. API documentation with playground. See Module 24 in goal.md (FR-24.1 through FR-24.14).

subtasks.description: Build app registration and OAuth token management
Implement event subscription and webhook delivery system
Create interactive message card framework
Build Bot SDK and API documentation playground

tasks.title: Build Buzz, Translation, and AI features as cross-cutting services
tasks.description: Buzz: urgent notification escalation (in-app, SMS, phone call via Twilio). Rate limiting. Translation: 100+ source languages, 18 targets. Auto-translate toggle. Message, doc, email, meeting subtitle translation. Pluggable backend (DeepL/Google/LibreTranslate). AI Features: Whisper transcription, meeting summaries, smart compose, doc summarization, AI writing assistant, smart scheduling. Pluggable LLM backend (OpenAI/Anthropic/Ollama). Usage quotas. See Modules 3, 21, 22 in goal.md.

subtasks.description: Implement Buzz notification system with multi-channel delivery
Build translation service with pluggable backend
Implement AI writing assistant and smart compose
Add pluggable LLM backend with usage quotas

tasks.title: Build frontend shell with three-panel layout and navigation
tasks.description: Three-panel desktop layout matching Lark: left sidebar (navigation rail + content list), center panel (active content), right panel (contextual info). Navigation rail with icons for all modules. Responsive breakpoints. Light/dark theme with system detection. Custom org branding (logo, accent color). Keyboard shortcuts (Cmd+K search, etc.). PWA support. This connects all module UIs into a unified app experience.

subtasks.description: Build three-panel layout shell with resizable panels
Implement navigation rail with module routing
Add light/dark theme with Tailwind + Radix
Implement keyboard shortcuts and PWA manifest

votes.reason: Should be done early (after T-001) so module UIs have a shell to live in. Could parallelize with T-002.
Frontend shell depends on auth routes existing first. No point building navigation to non-existent features.

Auth endpoints are stable (/auth/register, /auth/login, /auth/logout, /auth/me, /auth/sessions). Frontend shell can begin with auth screens (login, register) connected to these routes. Still agree: keep scope minimal until more backend modules exist.

comments.message: Reviewer note: The -1 vote is valid timing feedback, not a quality issue. Frontend shell can start once T-002 has the /auth/me endpoint working (done). Suggest small scope: just layout + auth screens first, expand as modules land.
